title: See all focus areas connected to a work item
description: When looking at the details of a focus area, the Work tab is the place where all the work items connected to the focus area are shown. Work items can contribute to the success of more than one focus area, so being able to see the list of those areas is helpful in understanding how important a piece of work is. If a work item is connected to more than one focus area, you'll see a lozenge next to the first focus areas name in the table that shows the number of additional areas. If you hover over t
